description_long: This handbag features a tightly woven exterior with a basket-weave pattern, blending pastel shades of blue, green, and tan. The body is rectangular with softly rounded edges and a structured silhouette, giving it a modern yet artisanal appearance. The weave is consistent across the entire surface, suggesting a high level of craftsmanship and durability. The front flap covers the main compartment, likely concealing a closure mechanism underneath. There are no visible handles or straps, indicating it may be a clutch or designed for hand-carry. The surface has a semi-soft, slightly matte finish, and no visible logos or decorative hardware are present.
description: A rectangular, woven handbag in pastel blue, green, and tan with a basket-weave pattern and a front flap closure. The design is structured, artisanal, and free of visible straps or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the handbag's slim profile and the continuity of the woven pattern along the edge.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full basket-weave pattern, the rectangular shape, and the front flap covering the main compartment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim profile and woven texture seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the woven pattern and structured form visible.
attribute_strap_type: none visible; likely a clutch with no straps or handles attached
attribute_closure_mechanism: flap closure; the front flap folds over the main compartment, closure mechanism is concealed
attribute_pattern: basket-weave geometric pattern in pastel colors
